# Lab inventory — devices in scope

## Test AP (the one we attack)

- Type: Pi #2 with hostapd
- SSID: MyTestNetwork
- BSSID (MAC): AA:BB:CC:11:22:33
- Channel: 11
- Encryption: WPA2-PSK
- Owner: me

## Test client (the victim)

- Device: Pixel 6
- MAC address (Wi-Fi): DD:EE:FF:44:55:66
- Owner: me
